# To setup automatic deploy to vServer, do following:

1. Go to the Github Repository as LeftCodes => Settings => Secrets and Variables => Actions:

2. You need to change following Variables:

- DEPLOY_PATH:
This must be the path to the server root directory location and look something like this:
/var/www/vhosts/left.codes/httpdocs/your-project-name

The rest of the variables can be left unchanged.
